title: Nucleic Acids Extraction from Single Cell Using MasterPure Complete DNA Purification
author: Sarah Romac

steps.title: Isolate individually protist cells (at least...
steps.instruction: Isolate individually protist cells (at least 50µm in length) using a glass bent micropipette under a binocular microscope.

steps.title: Wash each cell in three successive baths of 0
steps.instruction: Wash each cell in three successive baths of 0.22µm-filtered and sterile seawater.

steps.title: Transfer subsequently cells in a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer subsequently cells in a 1.5mL sterile microtube.

steps.title: Add 30 μL of lysis buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 30 μL of lysis buffer (Tissue and Cell Lysis Solution from MasterPureTM DNA and RNA Purification Kit, Epicenter) and store at -20°C.

steps.title: Pellet cells by centrifugation (2 min...
steps.instruction: Pellet cells by centrifugation (2 min at Vmax), throw the supernatant, let ~25-30 µL of liquid.

steps.title: Dilute 1 µL of Proteinase K...
steps.instruction: Dilute 1 µL of Proteinase K in 300 µL de lysis solution Tissue et Cellule for each sample. Vortex 10 sec for resuspending cells (facultative).

steps.title: Add 300 µL of mix Proteinase...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of mix Proteinase K + lysis solution Tissue et Cellule in each sample. Vortex.

steps.title: Incubate 15 min at 65°C , 1000 rpm
steps.instruction: Incubate 15 min at 65°C , 1000 rpm. Put samples in ice 3-5 min.

steps.title: Add 150 µL MPC reagent to...
steps.instruction: Add 150 µL MPC reagent to 300 µL of lysed sample. Vortex.

steps.title: Spin 10 min at 11 000 g, 4°C
steps.instruction: Spin 10 min at 11 000 g, 4°C. If there is no pellet, add more 25 µL MPC buffer and spin again 10 min at 11 000 g, 4°C.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant ion a new...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant ion a new clean microtube (1,5 mL), discard the pellet. (To keep the squeletton, keep the tube with the pellet, add 500 µL MilliQ Water and store at -20°C).

steps.title: Add 500 µL of Isopropanol
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of Isopropanol. Mix per inversion. Spin 10min at Vmax, 4°C.

steps.title: Discard the supernatant with precaution, without touching the pellet
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant with precaution, without touching the pellet.

steps.title: Add 500 µL of Ethanol 70%
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of Ethanol 70%. Don’t vortex, mix gently the support. Spin 5min at Vmax ;at 4°C.

steps.title: Discard a maximum of supernatant with...
steps.instruction: Discard a maximum of supernatant with precaution, without touching the pellet.

steps.title: Let dry 5-10 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Let dry 5-10 min at room temperature. The pellet should become transparent.

steps.title: Elute in 25 µL of TE1x buffer
steps.instruction: Elute in 25 µL of TE1x buffer. Vortex and spin shortly. Store at - 80°C.
